'''Nastyboy''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] thug on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. He was beating up [[Morgot]], who owed him [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]], when [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] arrived seeking Morgot. Aayla used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]], persuading Nastyboy to go home.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 43|''Star Wars'' (1998) 43]] {{1st}}
